description.value: The writings on your shell expand to include a vast array of knowledge about the entities found across the multiverse. Choose either @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Summon Celestial] or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Summon Fiend]. Once per day, you can cast the chosen spell as a divine innate spell heightened to half your level rounded up. The creature summoned must match the theme of the philosophical treatises marked on your shell, such as a creature with the angel trait if your treatise is on enlightenment achieved through virtuous acts.
